hero.headline: Implementation lead specializing in enterprise SaaS solutions
hero.description: 20 enterprise SaaS rollouts across the UK, US, and Middle East. 5+ years translating complex business requirements into working configurations and measurable outcomes. Expert at stakeholder engagement, solution design, and end-to-end delivery for mid-to-large enterprise clients.

experience.title: Lead, Product Implementation
bullets: Led 20 end-to-end enterprise SaaS implementations for mid-to-large clients — full lifecycle ownership from requirements mapping through configuration deployment and post-go-live support.
Engaged with customer stakeholders through executive workshops and operational team sessions; translated business processes into solution designs, BRDs, and implementation timelines.
Configured and tested SaaS instances tailored to each client's unique operational workflows, ensuring adoption and seamless business process integration.
Served as primary customer advocate internally — collaborating with product, engineering, and design teams to address client requirements and drive platform improvements.

highlights.label: Process mapping expertise
highlights.text: Developed use-case-driven implementation framework with complexity scoring models — enabling accurate scoping, automated timeline calculation, and streamlined requirements documentation for enterprise rollouts.

highlights.label: Enterprise delivery
highlights.text: Managed complex implementations across global regions — on-site delivery in Saudi Arabia and UK for high-value engagements, handling stakeholder workshops, requirements gathering, and go-live training.

highlights.label: Solution design & configuration
highlights.text: Owned comprehensive solution architecture — from stakeholder requirement sessions to technical configuration deployment. Collaborated cross-functionally to tailor platform configurations matching each client's operational processes.

highlights.label: Integration scoping
highlights.text: Defined integration requirements across SSO systems and third-party platforms. Evaluated API feasibility, determined integration patterns, and authored detailed requirement specifications for engineering implementation.

experience.title: Senior Catalog Specialist
bullets: Managed complex operational processes for Amazon Fresh, Amazon Pantry, and Prime Now — analyzing business workflows and implementing process improvements for enhanced efficiency.
Designed prioritisation frameworks using business forecasts and operational metrics — delivering significant process optimization and operational cost reduction.
Streamlined operational workflows by identifying process gaps and implementing standardized procedures — reducing workflow inefficiencies across support teams.

summary: Implementation lead with 5+ years delivering enterprise SaaS solutions for mid-to-large clients across global markets. Expert at requirements mapping, solution design, and complex system configuration. Proven track record of 20 successful implementations with full lifecycle ownership from scoping through post-go-live support. Strong background in stakeholder engagement, process optimization, and cross-functional team collaboration.

customSections.title: Enterprise Implementation Expertise
items: 20 enterprise SaaS rollouts across UK, US, and Middle East regions
Complex integration planning across SSO and third-party platforms
On-site delivery experience in Saudi Arabia and UK markets
4 of 5 pilot implementations converted to full enterprise rollouts
Cross-functional collaboration with product, engineering, and design teams
